name: mary-workflow
description: Cycle-aware workflows with validated paper close reading and source-grounded summaries for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Mary Workflow packages a stable v2.1 milestone engine plus v2.2 research skills for independent paper states, arXiv HTML/PDF acquisition, parse-quality gating, contract-validated close reading, source-locator indexing, grounded claim summaries, project execution, review, recovery, and cycle archives.
